focus: NDAA and Blue UAS compliant components and platforms

platforms.name: Platform One
platforms.power: 6S LiPO or LiON, XT60 bulkhead connector
platforms.notes: First-of-its-kind ecosystem fusing Western drone technologies. Inspired by Ukraine's decentralized FPV production model. Solder-free option available for trainer config.

configurations.name: FPV Trainer or EW
configurations.description: Learn to fly or defeat some jammers
featured_components: ORQA Iron Ghost or TBS/ELRS radio
TBS Lucid H7 FC or Orqa F405 3030 FC

configurations.name: Mesh Node
configurations.description: Communications relay for comms extension in GPS-denied environments
featured_components: Choice of Doodle Labs, BlueSDR, L3Harris, or Silvus radio

configurations.name: Autonomy Testing
configurations.description: Perception and navigation testing with modular sensors and autonomy stacks

radios.name: Doodle Labs NANO Mesh Rider Radio
radios.notes: Compact, low-SWaP datalink for small UxVs and swarms

radios.name: Doodle Labs MINI Mesh Rider Radio
radios.notes: High-throughput control & video backhaul. Used in Mesh Node config.

radios.name: BlueSDR
radios.notes: Ultra-light SDR for signal monitoring and EW experimentation. Wideband front-end.

radios.name: L3Harris SDR
radios.notes: Rugged SDR for contested RF environments.

radios.name: Silvus StreamCaster
radios.notes: MIMO mesh radio for resilient long-range data links. Used in Mesh Node config.

rc_links.name: ORQA Ghost
rc_links.notes: Low-latency digital RC. Used in FPV Trainer config.

rc_links.name: TBS Crossfire / ELRS
rc_links.notes: Long-range control with robust LQ. Used in FPV Trainer or EW config.

flight_controllers.name: TBS Lucid H7
flight_controllers.notes: High-performance H7 FC for demanding builds. Ample UARTs.

flight_controllers.name: BrainFPV RADIX 2 HD
flight_controllers.notes: Next-gen RADIX platform with digital-video friendly I/O. OSD/telemetry support.

flight_controllers.name: Orqa F405 3030 FC
flight_controllers.notes: Reliable F405-class controller for training and testing frames.

autopilot_compute.name: Raspberry Pi Compute Module 5 (CM5)
autopilot_compute.notes: Pairs with carrier boards for flexible I/O. Autonomy, logging, networking.

autopilot_compute.name: ModalAI VOXL 2
autopilot_compute.notes: On-board AI accelerator SoC. Used in Autonomy Testing config.

autopilot_compute.name: ModalAI VOXL 2 Mini
autopilot_compute.notes: Low SWaP. Integrates with Doodle Labs radios. Used in Mesh Node config.

cameras_sensors.name: NDAA Camera
cameras_sensors.notes: Used in FPV Trainer or EW config.

cameras_sensors.name: Low-light EO Camera
cameras_sensors.notes: Enhanced sensitivity for dawn/dusk ops. Used in Mesh Node and Autonomy Testing.

cameras_sensors.name: Perception Camera
cameras_sensors.notes: Global/rolling shutter options. Obstacle detection. Used in Autonomy Testing.

cameras_sensors.name: Downward LiDAR
cameras_sensors.notes: Short-to-mid range. Precision landing aid. Used in Autonomy Testing.

other_noted_products.name: Orqa FPV.One Pilot Goggles
other_noted_products.notes: Analog goggles available in Syndicate store.

other_noted_products.name: Fat Shark Aura Analog FPV Camera
Gremsy G-Hadron 640R
other_noted_products.notes: Higher-end camera/gimbal option in Syndicate store.

other_noted_products.name: Auterion Skynode-S
other_noted_products.notes: Listed as Platform One compatible autopilot/compute.

other_noted_products.name: ARK FPV
other_noted_products.notes: Listed as Platform One compatible hardware.
